title: July 2025 Stock Picks
subtitle: Our top 6 picks for the month ahead
youtubeTitle: July 2025 Monthly Stock Picks | The Signal
description: This month we're bullish on AI infrastructure, defense contracts, and space expansion. Here are our 6 top stock picks for July 2025.

picks.name: Palantir Technologies
picks.reason: AIP platform gaining enterprise traction with 40%+ revenue growth and expanding government contracts.

picks.name: Rocket Lab USA
picks.reason: Neutron launch vehicle on track for 2026 debut and expanding space systems revenue.

picks.name: Broadcom Inc.
picks.reason: VMware integration driving margin expansion and AI networking chip demand surging.

picks.name: Axon Enterprise
picks.reason: Recurring cloud revenue growing 50%+ and expanding TASER adoption internationally.

picks.name: Kratos Defense & Security
picks.reason: Drone systems and hypersonic test vehicles seeing increased DoD contract flow.

picks.name: SoFi Technologies
picks.reason: Path to GAAP profitability clear with member growth accelerating and lending margins expanding.
